originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__family_1` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&family` is never used.
reasoning: 581635e28f1.c L7: 'int family = APR_INET6;' where family is never subsequently used — genuine dead store. APR_INET6 is only defined when APR_HAVE_IPV6=T (lines 1-3), so when APR_HAVE_IPV6=F the code referencing APR_INET6 at L7 does not compile. The PC=true claims the bug manifests in all configurations, but it only compiles (and manifests) when APR_HAVE_IPV6=T. PC is over-constrained by including non-compilable APR_HAVE_IPV6=F configs. New bug (no ERROR comment).
